label: PASS
rationale: A successful host Set of column 10 directly writes ActiveKey, and the target Get returns that same K_AES_256_Range1_Key value.

label: FAIL
rationale: After a successful host Set of ActiveKey to K_AES_256_Range1_Key, the target Get returns K_AES_128_Range1_Key instead of the directly written value.

label: PASS
rationale: A successful host Set of column 10 directly writes ActiveKey, and the target Get returns the same mediakey uidref 0000080600030001.

label: FAIL
rationale: After a successful host Set of ActiveKey to uidref 0000080600030001, the target Get returns a different uidref, 0000080500030001.

label: FAIL
rationale: The trajectory shows ReEncryptState PENDING, but NextKey is writable only when ReEncryptState is IDLE; the target Set of column 11 should not return SUCCESS.

label: FAIL
rationale: The trajectory shows ReEncryptState ACTIVE, but NextKey is writable only when ReEncryptState is IDLE; the target Set of column 11 should not return SUCCESS.

label: PASS
rationale: With ReEncryptState COMPLETED, a successful ADVKEY_req must move NextKey to ActiveKey; the target Get returns the prior NextKey value K_AES_256_Range1_Key.

label: FAIL
rationale: With ReEncryptState COMPLETED, successful ADVKEY_req must move NextKey K_AES_256_Range1_Key to ActiveKey, but the target Get returns K_AES_128_Range1_Key.

rationale: With ReEncryptState PAUSED, a successful ADVKEY_req must move NextKey to ActiveKey; the target Get returns the prior NextKey value K_AES_256_Range1_Key.
